rows.subnote: First scored Apr 19 · re-scored Apr 28 after distillation pass.

history.note: Counter-pattern added: drive-by OSS PRs don't count

rows.takeaway: Nathan would have passed the v1 rubric (82 / threshold 70). After 3 interviewer feedback events compounded into the skill, the same evidence now scores 65 — below threshold. The system learned what we kept missing.
